display.title: Authoritative Server — Limits Lab
display.description: A QA harness for the hammurabi-headless authoritative server. Clients click per-limit test buttons; the server executes each limit-pushing operation (concurrent fetches, WebSocket size/count, comms rate limits, entity spam) and reports the outcome back via synced components. Includes a gated DANGER ZONE for destructive tests that intentionally kill the server isolate.
